description.value:
You have started to develop Occultism beyond other skills, delving deeper into its possibilities.

Core Feats

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hDGosy2ZTwnyctEP]{Oddity Identification}

Choose one Skill Path and gain that path's Trained feat.

Available Skill Paths

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.gopX1q8wdFmKSOYm]{Spellcraft (Occultism) Path - Trained}: Your excellent knowledge of spells helps you identifying spells with great success.
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.8K3mCiBts85kO7UL]{Itemcraft (Occultism) Path - Trained}: Your knowledge of magical items empowers you use them to beyond their limits.
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.sMSOAbUCzsCZdt0f]{Psyche Path - Trained}: Through much training you gained a few psychic abilities.
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.PmmCAs9ljPQbu0h9]{Shrouded Subterfuge Path - Trained}: You use the fanatism of Cults and Faiths to Lie and decieve them.
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.2hsDwvHoZ4vHrYvD]{Warding Path - Trained}: Crystals offer some unique healing options. You know all of them.
